details.brokersummary:
Luxury 3 Bed /1.5 Bath in Prime Bedford-Stuyvesant
Spacious 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath apartment featuring an open-concept living/dining layout, stainless steel appliances, queen- to king-size bedrooms, excellent closet space, and abundant natural light throughout.
Ideally located just 2 blocks from the Broadway-Chauncey J, Z & M trains, surrounded by top restaurants, bars, organic markets, and shopping.

Beautiful 2-Bedroom, 1-Bath Apartment!
Apartment Features:
Air Conditioning for Year-Round Comfort Sleek Hardwood Flooring Throughout Modern Stainless Steel Appliances Convenient Dishwasher Expansive Living and Dining Area Recently Renovated Bathrooms with Elegant Finishes Abundant Natural Light in Every Room Stylish Track Lighting
Pet-Friendly ? Furry Companions Welcome! Available 3/1 No broker fee

Photos of a very similar unit
Luxury Living at The Dean Discover a condo-style residence in Crown Heights featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, hardwood floors, premium appliances, a large balcony, and stunning city views.
Exceptional Amenities Enjoy a stylish lobby, multiple lounges, a landscaped courtyard with greenhouse, gym, yoga studio, rooftop deck ( coming soon), business lounge, doorman, and laundry on every floor.
Prime Location Just steps from the A/C/S trains and minutes to Manhattan, surrounded by top Brooklyn dining, bars, and cafes. Can reach out if needed a sooner move as well

Myspace Exclusive!
One bedroom + Home office available with separate living room and kitchen in 1920s elevator prewar with live-in super.
Queen sized bedroom Full sized bedroom MASSIVE living room space Stainless steel kitchen
Fabulous location just steps from Montrose L / Flushing JMZ trains and surrounded by tons of great bars, restaurants & shopping. Short commute to Manhattan!
April 1 move in No broker fee Heat & hot water included Small pets welcome

Huge renovated 2.5br. These have been used at 3brs in the past and each room has a private entrance and window but very little common space. Works a lot better as a large 2br with one of the additional rooms used as common space. You?ll get a sense of the space by seeing the video. If you can?t see it, please see the listing on StreetEasy or text me and I can send it to you. note . the apartment is unfurnished and do not come with bed frames show in photos
This apt is beautifully renovated with: Hardwood floors Dishwasher Stainless steel appliances Windows in all bedrooms plus a small skylight in the living room Heat/AC units in each room allowing you to control temp per room (huge savings on utilities) Laundry in the building Owner will purchase standing closets if needed. Fantastic locations with tons of local spots to enjoy Located 2min walk to L and M train lines in prime Bushwick (myrtle/wyckoff stop of L/M)
Pets ok No broker fee Just 1st and security to move in
Call or text to take a look right away!

Act fast! This amazing two bedroom / 2 full bathroom with massive private yard can be yours! Get the best of both worlds as the building is located on a quiet, tree-lined residential street in the heart of bustling Bushwick. This pet friendly apartment features hardwood floors throughout, cozy bedrooms with windows and a spacious kitchen with wood top bar/island opening into living area. Located only four short blocks to the L train, commuting will be a cinch! Get the best of both worlds as the building is located on a quiet, tree-lined residential street in the heart of bustling Bushwick.
No fee Pets ok Call or text to view right away

Large 2BR with queen size rooms, large balcony and huge PRIVATE roof deck and private balcony. Common area big enough for a couch, tv and dining table. The unit features stainless steel appliances including dishwasher and microwave, hardwood floor, white tile kitchen backsplash and bathroom, individual a/c units in each room. Spiral staircase to a small room which opens to your own private roof deck. The building features an elevator, laundry room, roof deck, zip car, security system, and is located in the center of Bushwick!
Building also features 2 large shared roof decks and a laundry room. Parking and zip car services available. Elevator
1/2 a block from the Dekalb L and 5min walk to the M train. NO fee
Call or text to take a look right away!

Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed/ 1. bath apartment in Ridgewood, prime location!
This apartment features spacious living room, queen sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues.

Virtual tours available!
Beautiful apartment in Williamsburg, prime location!
This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom(s), stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby's All Right, Patrizia's, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods.

Spacious 4 Bed / 1.5 Bath at 877 Hart St, Unit 1L ? Bushwick, Brooklyn. All pets welcome! Just minutes from the DeKalb L and Knickerbocker M trains. This well-priced, split-level 4-bedroom features three bedrooms upstairs and one downstairs. Enjoy high ceilings, exposed brick, and natural light throughout?including the common areas. Separate living room and a sleek kitchen with stainless steel appliances.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Modern 1 Bed / 1 Bath at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious 1-bedroom features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

Luxury Waterfront Living at 44 Kent
Experience modern living on the northern Brooklyn waterfront. This luxury building offers a finished rooftop with sweeping views of Manhattan and the Williamsburg Bridge.
Amenities include a fitness center, business center, bike storage, and optional parking. Inside, each unit features condo-quality finishes: central air, dishwasher, beautiful hardwood floors, designer windows, and more.

Beautiful 3 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location!
This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short distance to the J, M trains.

Modern Studio at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious Studio features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

Experience Brooklyn living at 1010 Pacific St. You?ll find this community in the Prospect Heights area of Brooklyn. Experience a new standard at 1010 Pacific St.
Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

Experience Brooklyn living at 1010 Pacific St. You?ll find this community in the Prospect Heights area of Brooklyn. Experience a new standard at 1010 Pacific St.
Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

Experience Brooklyn living at 1010 Pacific St. You?ll find this community in the Prospect Heights area of Brooklyn. Experience a new standard at 1010 Pacific St.
Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.
Apartment Features: -Expansive living areas boasting breathtaking views -Fully equipped kitchens with stainless steel appliances -Dishwasher -In-unit washer/dryer for added convenience -Individual AC/Heat units -Big windows inviting abundant natural light -Soaring high ceilings and elegant hardwood floors
Building Amenities: -State-of-the-art fitness center -Relaxing sauna -Basketball and tennis courts -Inviting indoor pool with direct access to outdoor pool deck -Multiple BBQ grilling areas -Rooftop retreat offering panoramic views -Residents lounge and versatile working space -Entertainment-filled recreation room -Secure bicycle storage -Convenient elevators -Parking garage available (additional fee applies)
Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.

Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

Prime Crown Heights 2 bedroom with queen-size rooms, strong natural light, ample closet space, central air, and laundry in building.

Beautiful 4 bed / 2 bath with exposed brick and hardwood floors.
Modern kitchen with stone countertops + stainless steel appliances.
Located in Ditmas Park.
Easy commute via the 2/3 or B/Q trains.

Welcome to 1326 Ocean Ave Studios ? 1-Bed ? 2-Bed Apartments in Prime Midwood / Ditmas Park
Spacious, well-designed residences featuring high ceilings, large kitchens with dishwashers, and excellent closet space. Select units offer private balconies, and all layouts are designed to comfortably accommodate modern living.
Apartment Features
High ceilings
Large kitchens
Dishwasher
Queen-size bedroom layouts
Ample closet space
Private balconies (select units)
Building Amenities
Gym
Rooftop
Lounge
Game room
Bike storage
Laundry room
Conveniently located near shops, dining, and transportation.

Welcome to 1326 Ocean Ave Studios ? 1-Bed ? 2-Bed Apartments in Prime Midwood / Ditmas Park
Spacious, well-designed residences featuring high ceilings, large kitchens with dishwashers, and excellent closet space. Select units offer private balconies, and all layouts are designed to comfortably accommodate modern living.
Apartment Features
High ceilings
Large kitchens
Dishwasher

Ample closet space
Private balconies (select units)
Building Amenities
Gym
Rooftop
Lounge
Game room
Bike storage
Laundry room
Conveniently located near shops, dining, and transportation.

Brand New Modern Luxury Building ? Full Amenities
Beautifully designed residences featuring:
? Hardwood floors throughout ? High ceilings & great natural light ? Generous closet space ? Private outdoor terrace ? perfect for relaxing or entertaining ? Gourmet kitchen with marble island & stainless steel appliances ? Dishwasher included ? Sleek modern bathroom with deep soaking tub ? Central heating & A/C ? Video intercom system
Building Amenities:
? Fully equipped gym ? Resident lounge ? Game room ? Co-working space ? Laundry room ? Bike storage ? Package room ? Rooftop with stunning views ? Private parking available
Only a 3-minute walk to the B & Q trains at E 16th St / Ave M
Guarantors welcome.
Reach out to schedule a tour.

Luxury, brand-new 2br/2bth in the heart of Brooklyn with abundant natural light and in-unit washer/dryer, plus amenities including a gym, bike room, package room, parking, roof deck, and co-working space.

NO FEE! Gorgeous newly renovated 4-bedroom in a beautiful Bed-Stuy building. Features an oversized living room, modern kitchen with full appliances, hardwood floors throughout, central A/C & heat, virtual doorman, and abundant natural light. Building offers laundry, bike storage, and a shared backyard. Pets allowed, guarantors welcome. Steps from great dining and the A, C & G trains for an easy Manhattan commute.

🌞 Bright 2BR in Prime Bushwick ? NO FEE! 🌞
Welcome home to this sun-filled two bedroom in the heart of Bushwick.
? Queen-size bedrooms (fit full furniture sets) ? Central air & heat ? Laundry in building ? Shared rooftop access ? Clean, modern finishes
Great layout with natural light and well-proportioned bedrooms.
📍Prime Bushwick location ? close to trains, cafes, and neighborhood favorites.
Contact to schedule a showing ? this won?t last!

Brand New Modern Luxury Building ? Full Amenities
Beautifully designed residences featuring:
? Hardwood floors throughout ? High ceilings & great natural light ? Generous closet space ? Private outdoor terrace ? perfect for relaxing or entertaining ? Gourmet kitchen with marble island & stainless steel appliances ? Dishwasher included ? Sleek modern bathroom with deep soaking tub ? Central heating & A/C ? Video intercom system

Guarantors welcome.
Reach out to schedule a tour.

Affordable Housing Unit ? Income Requirements Apply
To qualify for this 2-bedroom:
?? ?Household income must be between $144,000 ? $168,000 annually ?? ?Total household assets must not exceed $200,000
Brand-new luxury residences now leasing at 1800 Ocean Ave ? offering studios, 1-bedroom & 2-bedroom layouts in a full-service building.
Apartment Features: ? Private balconies (select units) ? Modern kitchens & bathrooms ? Dishwasher + built-in microwave ? Spacious layouts with great closet space ? Central A/C & heat ? Excellent natural light ? Video intercom ? Pet friendly
Building Amenities: ? Fitness center ? Laundry room ? Resident lounge & game room ? Co-working space ? Package room ? Rooftop with open views ? Bike storage ? On-site parking
Conveniently located near Avenue M / E 16th St (B & Q trains).
Guarantors welcome. Schedule a tour today!

Conveniently located near Avenue M / E 16th St (B & Q trains).
Guarantors welcome. Schedule a tour today!

Modern 1 & 2 bedroom residences in a full-service building steps from Prospect Park.
Bright, well-designed apartments feature large windows, stainless steel appliances, marble bathrooms, and in-unit washer/dryers. Select homes include private balconies.
Building Amenities ? Rooftop with grills & seating ? Fitness center ? Co-working lounge ? Landscaped courtyard ? Dog run ? Bike storage & parking available
Set in the heart of Prospect Lefferts Gardens near Prospect Park, local dining, shopping, and multiple subway lines for an easy commute

Brand-new luxury residences now leasing at 1800 Ocean Ave ? offering studios, 1-bedroom & 2-bedroom layouts in a full-service building.
Apartment Features: ? Private balconies (select units) ? Modern kitchens & bathrooms ? Dishwasher + built-in microwave ? Spacious layouts with great closet space ? Central A/C & heat ? Excellent natural light ? Video intercom ? Pet friendly
Building Amenities: ? Fitness center ? Laundry room ? Resident lounge & game room ? Co-working space ? Package room ? Rooftop with open views ? Bike storage ? On-site parking ($350/month)
Conveniently located near Avenue M / E 16th St (B & Q trains).
Guarantors welcome. Schedule a tour today!

Brand-New Luxury 1 Bedroom w/ Balcony!
Be the first to live in this newly constructed luxury 1-bedroom featuring a spacious layout and modern finishes throughout.
Features include:
In-unit washer & dryer
Central heating & cooling
Hardwood floors
High ceilings
Modern kitchen with stone counters, dishwasher & built-in microwave
Marble bathroom with soaking tub
Private balcony (select units)
Virtual doorman
Rooftop, backyard, package room & bike storage. Steps to the 2 & 5 trains and a short walk to Prospect Park.

Brand-New Luxury 2 Bedroom w/ private backyard!
Be the first to live in this newly constructed luxury 2 -bedroom featuring a spacious layout and modern finishes throughout.
Features include:
In-unit washer & dryer
Central heating & cooling
Hardwood floors
High ceilings
Modern kitchen with stone counters, dishwasher & built-in microwave
Marble bathroom with soaking tub
Virtual doorman
Rooftop, backyard, package room & bike storage. Steps to the 2 & 5 trains and a short walk to Prospect Park.

Rent-stabilized four-bedroom, two-bath duplex on Malcolm X Boulevard. This bright and spacious apartment features great natural light, a functional duplex layout, and generously sized rooms throughout. A rare find offering space, light, and long-term value.

Luxury, brand-new studio in the heart of Brooklyn with abundant natural light and in-unit washer/dryer, plus amenities including a gym, bike room, package room, parking, roof deck, and co-working space.

Conveniently located near shops, dining, and transportation.

Beautifully designed, spacious 1-bedroom duplex with a large open basement. This home features central heat and A/C, exposed brick throughout, hardwood floors, and generous closet space. The sunny bedroom highlights a striking exposed brick wall, while the modern kitchen offers ample room to cook and entertain.
Building amenities include laundry on site and a shared backyard. Located in vibrant Bed-Stuy, just a short walk to the Gates Ave (J/M/Z) and Utica Ave (A/C) trains.
Excellent deal on a 2-bedroom apartment just steps from Church Ave station. Laundry in building and roof access included. Reach out today for a showing!

3BR / 1.5BA in Prime-time location!
Brand-new luxury apartment featuring hardwood floors, a designer kitchen with marble countertops, stainless steel appliances, dishwasher, high ceilings, great closet space, and abundant natural light. Queen-size bedrooms, double-pane windows, and a modern bath with deep soaking tub.
Building amenities include: rooftop access, laundry room, bike storage, virtual doorman, package room, and security system.
Just minutes to Prospect Park, Botanical Gardens, and the Franklin Ave / Eastern Parkway trains (2,3,4,5,B,Q). Surrounded by top bars, restaurants, caf?s, and shops.
Pet-friendly. Guarantors welcome. Virtual & in-person showings available ? schedule today.

Amazing location blocks from Prospect Park in Prospect Lefferts Gardens. Feel the history of Brooklyn on brownstone-lined streets and in locally owned bars, restaurants, coffee shops and more. Not only will you have the chance for somewhat of a city escape, but you will still have everything you need around you with full size grocers, pharmacies, bodegas, liquor stores, retail shops, tattoo shops, whatever your heart desires! You won't be miss out on any luxuries inside your new home at The Ballgreen Complex either! Fully equipped with all a renter could need in NYC. Come on by and take a look with us!
Conveniently located off the 2, 5, and Q trains, as well as the B12, B35, B44, and B49 bus lines.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C and Heat Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Finished Roof Deck Parking (by availability) Virtual Doorman

Amazing location blocks from Prospect Park in Prospect Lefferts Gardens. Feel the history of Brooklyn on brownstone-lined streets and in locally owned bars, restaurants, coffee shops and more. Not only will you have the chance for somewhat of a city escape, but you will still have everything you need around you with full size grocers, pharmacies, bodegas, liquor stores, retail shops, tattoo shops, whatever your heart desires! You won't be miss out on any luxuries inside your new home at The Ballgreen Complex either! Fully equipped with all a renter could need in NYC. Come on by and take a look with us!
Conveniently located off the 2, 5, and Q trains, as well as the B12, B35, B44, and B49 bus lines.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C and Heat Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Finished Roof Deck Parking (by availability) Virtual Doorman

Come live your Bushwick LOFT DREAMS!! Offering both single floor and duplex units, 12 ? 20ft ceilings, HUGE sprawling bedrooms and floor plans, concrete and brick aesthetic, big industrial rooftop with city views, ALL the things you could be looking for in a loft are found here!
Conveniently located off the J, M, and Z trains as well as the B38, B46, B47, B54, and B60 bus lines.
Mix that with all modern renovations and amenities such as? Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Game Room Fitness Center ?and you?ll truly have it all

This Ridgewood neighborhood backs right up to Bushwick, serving as it's older and wiser sibling :) You can enjoy all of the same delicious cuisine, fair trade hot (and necessary) coffee, unique locally owned businesses, bodegas and grocers, and centralized transportation as it's neighboring Brooklyn areas, all while keeping that lovely community feel of a slightly more residential and peaceful existence. *Long exhale* now that's the right choice.Conveniently located off the L train and the B13, B38, B57 bus routes.

Amazing location blocks from Prospect Park in Prospect Lefferts Gardens. Feel the history of Brooklyn on brownstone-lined streets and in locally owned bars, restaurants, coffee shops and more. Not only will you have the chance for somewhat of a city escape, but you will still have everything you need around you with full size grocers, pharmacies, bodegas, liquor stores, retail shops, tattoo shops, whatever your heart desires! You won't be miss out on any luxuries inside your new home at The Ballgreen Complex either! Fully equipped with all a renter could need in NYC. Come on by and take a look with us!
Conveniently located off the 2, 5, and Q trains, as well as the B12, B35, B44, and B49 bus lines.

BUILDING FEATURES: Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Finished Roof Deck Parking (by availability) Virtual Doorman
